data_description.name: A friendly name for this room (e.g. Master Bathroom)
data_description.humidity_sensor: The humidity sensor in this room
data_description.dehumidifier_switch: Optional switch to turn on while the fan is running due to high humidity

data_description.fan_timeout: How long the fan runs after the light turns off (seconds)
data_description.max_timeout: Maximum time the fan runs when turned on manually (minutes)
data_description.humidity_threshold: Humidity percentage above baseline to trigger fan (percent)
